data.title: Rio Tinto CEO Defends London Listing, Outlines Future Growth Plans
data.description: Rio Tinto CEO Stausholm dismissed calls to abandon London listing, reaffirmed commitment to decarbonization and presented growth plans.

data.title: Sam Altman Isn't Worried About Elon Musk's Trump Ties, But Admits xAI Is A 'Really Serious Competitor' To OpenAI: 'Elon Will Do The Right Thing'
data.description: Sam Altman downplayed concerns about Elon Musk's political ties to Donald Trump but acknowledged that Musk's AI startup, xAI, poses a serious threat to OpenAI.

data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Gains; Dollar Slips While Bitcoin Hits $100K - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. markets closed higher on strong tech earnings and Fed Chair Powell's remarks. Asia and Europe markets were mixed. Oil prices up, gold down.

data.title: Why Verint Systems Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 23%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Elon Musk Lauds Ro Khanna, Calls Him A 'Sensible Moderate' After California Democrat Calls Out Gavin Newsom's Exclusion Of Tesla From EV Credit Policy
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk appreciated support from Congressman Ro Khanna, who voiced his disapproval of Governor Gavin Newsom's electric vehicle subsidy plan.
